title: Polemonium gayanum
taxonomy: Polemonium gayanum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of the southwestern United States and Mexico. The scientific classification of Polemonium gayanum includes the kingdom Plantae, the order Ericales, and the genus Polemonium. Within the genus, Polemonium gayanum is a distinct species that can be identified by its unique characteristics. The classification of Polemonium gayanum reflects its evolutionary relationships and distinct features within the plant kingdom.
